1100700699.english: - At that moment, I heard the sound of an AGS walking down the corridor.
1100700699.korean: - 그때, 통로에서 AGS가 걸어오는 듯한 소리가 들렸다.

1100700701.english: - After waiting a moment, the footsteps stopped, and someone knocked on the door.
1100700701.korean: - 잠시 기다리자 그 발소리는 멈췄고, 누군가 문을 두드렸다.

1100700703.english: - As the door opened, Serena entered the room wearing her equipment. It probably came during the filming.
1100700703.korean: - 문이 열리자 사레나가 장비를 착용한 채 방으로 들어왔다. 아마도 촬영 도중에 온 거겠지.

1100700706.english: Um... They say that Iron Blooded Beast has appeared again... I heard it from Cardinal Armand...
1100700706.korean: 저기……. 그 철충이 또 나타났다고… 아르망에게 들었는데요….

1100700707.english: Please let me participate in that operation too!

1100700710.english: - As I was about to speak, Marie shook her head to the side. I decided to leave it to her.
1100700710.korean: - 내가 입을 열려고 하자 마리가 고개를 옆으로 저었다. 나는 그녀에게 맡기기로 했다.

1100700711.english: Because there's no chance I'll be using you in this battle.
1100700711.korean: 이 전투에서 널 기용할 가능성이 없기 때문이다.

1100700712.english: Still! I... to that Metal Parasite...!

1100700713.english: And this fight isn't about your revenge.
1100700713.korean: 그리고 이 싸움은 네 설욕을 위한 싸움이 아니다.

1100700715.english: I, I lost a friend to that Metal Parasite...
1100700715.korean: 저, 저는 그 철충에게… 친구를 잃었어요….

1100700717.english: I just want to get revenge.

1100700718.english: I understand that feeling. But it's not allowed. This has already become a problem for our Orca. You can't prioritize your feelings and prepare for a situation where you can fight.
1100700718.korean: 그 마음은 안다. 하지만 안 된다. 이건 이미 우리 오르카의 문제가 되었다. 네 감정을 우선해서 네가 싸울 수 있는 상황을 준비할 수는 없어.

1100700720.english: He's a cunning connector. They're gathering the Iron Beasts, growing their numbers, and coming this way. We must also apply the most effective strategy on our side to minimize the damage.
1100700720.korean: 녀석은 교활한 연결체다. 철충을 모아 무리를 키우며 이쪽으로 오고 있어. 우리 쪽에서도 가장 유효한 작전을 적용해 피해를 최소화하지 않으면 안 된다.

1100700721.english: Perhaps they will deploy a large number of Iron Blooded Beasts to disrupt the battlefield, while they themselves remain hidden and attempt to snipe the commander.
1100700721.korean: 아마도 대량의 철충을 전면에 내세워 전장을 교란하고 자신은 몸을 감춘 채 사령관을 저격하려고 노릴 거다.

1100700722.english: Previously, the entity that attacked us also... took advantage of an opening and shot the commander, Grand Marshal Rapiata. Thanks to that, the resistance's functionality was temporarily impaired.
1100700722.korean: 이전, 우리를 공격한 개체도… 빈틈을 노려 지휘관이던 라비아타 통령을 저격했다. 그 덕분에 저항군의 기능이 한순간에 저하된 적이 있다.

1100700723.english: - This is the story of the time I was discovered by Constantia and the P/A-00 Griffon. According to the records, Prototype Labiata was shot the moment he appeared on the battlefield. There's no guaranty they'll use the same method, but it's necessary to be cautious enough.
1100700723.korean: - 내가 콘스탄챠와 그리폰에게 발견되었던 시기의 이야기다. 기록에 의하면 라비아타는 전장에 나타난 순간 저격당했다. 같은 수법을 쓸 거라는 보장은 없지만, 충분히 주의할 필요가 있다.

1100700724.english: So, unless we know where he'll appear, we can't let our guard down, and we can't give him a chance to get revenge. To put it more bluntly, I don't have the luxury.
1100700724.korean: 그러니 녀석이 어디에서 나타날지 알지 못하는 이상, 우리도 방심할 수 없고, 원수를 갚을 자리를 마련해 줄 수도 없다. 더 말하자면 그럴 여유가 없다.

1100700726.english: - Sarena was looking at Indomitable Marie with a slightly annoyed expression. Although her tone was harsh, Indomitable Marie's words were not wrong.
1100700726.korean: - 사레나는 조금 분한 듯한 눈빛으로 마리를 보고 있었다. 말투가 엄하긴 했지만, 마리의 말은 틀리지 않았다.

1100700728.english: Yes... Please... Please... I'm begging you.

1100700730.english: - I understand Serena's feelings. However, trying to make that happen could put the other crew members in danger. That's unacceptable.
1100700730.korean: - 사레나의 마음은 안다. 하지만 그걸 실현해 주려고 하면 다른 대원들을 위험에 처하게 할 가능성이 있다. 그건 용인할 수 없다.

1100700731.english: Okay, since filming is about to start again... I'll head back.
1100700731.korean: 그럼, 슬슬 다시 촬영이 시작되니까… 돌아갈게요.

1100700733.english: - Serena's back as she left the room looked strangely small, even tho she was wearing the equipment of the 8th generation.
1100700733.korean: - 방을 나서는 사레나의 뒷모습은 Ⅷ세의 장비를 입고 있음에도 이상하게 작아 보였다.

1100700737.english: Did I go a little too far with what I said?

1100700738.english: - If I had told you, you probably would have been racking your brains to see if there was anything you could do for Serena.
1100700738.korean: - 아마 내가 이야기했다면, 사레나를 위해 무언가 해줄 수 없을지 궁리했을 거다.

1100700739.english: It's a bit hypocritical of me to say this after saying that, but please include Serena in the operation. Your Excellency... oh, as if the director secretly had you participate.
1100700739.korean: 그런 말을 해 놓고 이러는 것도 좀 그렇지만, 사레나를 작전에 참여시켜 주십시오. 각하가… 아, 감독님께서 몰래 참여시켰다는 식으로요.

1100700740.english: Yes. I understand their desire for revenge, and Serena's combat power is helpful.
1100700740.korean: 네. 원수를 갚고 싶어 하는 그 마음도 이해되고, 사레나의 전투력은 도움이 됩니다.

1100700741.english: However, since it's realistically difficult to confront the stalker directly, I've said no once.
1100700741.korean: 하지만, 스토커를 직접 상대하게 하는 건 현실적으로 어려우므로, 한 번 NO라고 얘기해 두었습니다.

1100700742.english: Now, they'll be satisfied just by participating in the operation.
1100700742.korean: 이제 작전에 참여하는 것만으로도 만족해 주겠지요.

1100700743.english: Actually, I'd like you to come along as my escort, but I know you wouldn't like that, so I'll ask you to escort the rear supply unit instead.
1100700743.korean: 사실은 제 호위로 따라와 주었으면 합니다만… 그건 싫어할 테니, 후방 보급 부대의 호위를 부탁하겠습니다.

1100700744.english: No, please don't worry about it. Because I did it on my own.
1100700744.korean: 아뇨, 신경 쓰지 마십시오. 제가 멋대로 한 일이니까요.

1100700745.english: - Indomitable Marie said that and laughed. Once this operation is over, I'll have to explain things properly to Serena.
1100700745.korean: - 마리는 그렇게 말하며 웃었다. 이 작전이 끝나면, 사레나에게 제대로 설명해 줘야겠다.

1100700748.english: - Because the group led by the stalker was growing in size and approaching, we also quickly prepared for battle.
1100700748.korean: - 스토커가 이끄는 무리가 점점 몸집을 키우며 접근하고 있기에 우리도 매우 빠른 속도로 전투 준비를 진행했다.

1100700749.english: - If we continue like this, we'll arrive in the city where we are by tomorrow morning at the latest, so we've decided to carry out the operation tonight.
1100700749.korean: - 이대로 가면 내일 아침에라도 우리가 있는 도시에 도착해 버리므로 작전은 오늘 밤 결행하기로 했다.

1100700750.english: - So, the movie shoot was stopped today.

1100700751.english: The construction of the base is almost complete. Now we just have to wait for the stalker extermination unit and the enemy.
1100700751.korean: 진지의 구축은 거의 완료되었다. 이제 스토커 토벌부대와 적을 기다리기만 하면 돼.

1100700752.english: Okay, I understand. On this side, all that's left is to load the stalker extermination unit members onto the transport plane and send them over there.
1100700752.korean: 알겠습니다. 이쪽도 스토커 토벌부대원을 수송기에 태워서 그쪽으로 보내는 일만 남았어요.

1100700753.english: Additional supply units are also scheduled to sortie after that. Please let me know if there's anything unusual.
1100700753.korean: 추가 보급 부대도 그 후에 출격할 예정이에요. 뭔가 특이 사항이 있다면 알려주세요.

1100700755.english: Director, according to Ms. Aeda, the stalker's behavior hasn't changed.
1100700755.korean: 감독님, 에이다 씨의 말에 의하면 스토커의 행동에는 변화가 없다고 합니다.

1100700756.english: - It's a trick the Trickster used before. Just in case there's a possibility...
1100700756.korean: - 예전에 트릭스터가 사용한 수법이다. 만일의 가능성도 있으니….

1100700757.english: They're also doing a wide-area scan just in case, but it doesn't seem likely at this point.
1100700757.korean: 혹시 몰라 대비해 광역 스캔도 하고 있다고 합니다만, 아직까지는 그럴 가능성은 없는 듯 해요

1100700758.english: - It wasn't a large-scale operation, but we needed to take thorough and multi-layered measures to deal with the stalker.
1100700758.korean: - 그렇게 규모가 큰 작전은 아니지만, 스토커 대응책을 몇 중이고 철저히 할 필요가 있었다.

1100700759.english: - Thanks to that, the base was very busy.

1100700760.english: - Come to think of it, Alpha just mentioned the supply unit... I should ask Serena to participate in escorting the supply unit.
1100700760.korean: - 그러고 보니 지금, 알파가 보급부대 얘기를 했지… 사레나에게 보급부대의 호위에 참여해달라고 얘기해야겠다.

1100700761.english: - As I looked at Vanilla A1 standing next to me, it seemed she was also looking this way, and our eyes met immediately.
1100700761.korean: - 옆에 서 있던 바닐라를 보자 바닐라도 이쪽을 보고 있었던 듯, 바로 눈이 마주쳤다.

1100700762.english: Yes. Would you like some more hot chocolate?

1100700763.english: - Vanilla A1, speaking with a slightly mischievous smile...
1100700763.korean: - 약간 짓궂은 미소를 띠며 말하는 바닐라….

1100700765.english: - I was going to call Serena, but I've changed my mind a little.
1100700765.korean: - 사레나를 부르려고 했으나, 조금 생각이 바뀌었다.

1100700767.english: Okay, I understand. Have a good trip.

1100700768.english: Don't worry about this side. I'll get the preparations underway.
1100700768.korean: 이쪽 일은 신경 쓰지 마세요. 준비를 진행해 둘게요.

1100700769.english: - Leaving the base, I headed toward the Vanilla A1 and the Orca.
1100700769.korean: - 기지를 나와서 나는 바닐라와 오르카 호로 향했다.

1100700770.english: Didn't you have something to discuss with Ms. Sarena?
1100700770.korean: 사레나 씨에게 용무가 있던 게 아닌가요?

1100700771.english: - As soon as I arrived at the Orca, I headed to Magical MoMo's room.
1100700771.korean: - 나는 오르카 호에 도착하자 모모의 방으로 향했다.

1100700772.english: - As soon as I rang the call bell, the door opened with a lively voice.
1100700772.korean: - 호출 종을 울리자 곧바로 기운찬 목소리와 함께 문이 열렸다.

1100700773.english: Director?! Huh? Weren't you supposed to be at the base today because of the operation...?
1100700773.korean: 감독님?! 어라? 오늘은 작전 때문에 기지에 계신 거 아니었나요…?

1100700775.english: Oh, hello Vanilla A1 beans too!

1100700776.english: Yes, Magical BaekTo said he felt a dark energy and went for a walk with Mr. Rhein Ritter.
1100700776.korean: 네, 백토는 어둠의 기운이 느껴진다면서 라인리터 씨와 산책하러 나갔어요.

1100700777.english: Mr. Rhein Ritter has also been acting very enthusiastically lately, so it seems he and BaekTo are getting along well these days. I'm feeling a bit conflicted because you're listening to Mr. Rhein Ritter more than me...
1100700777.korean: 라인리터 씨도 어쩐지 굉장히 적극적으로 연기해 주고 계셔서 요즘 백토와 사이가 좋은가 봐요. 제 말보다 라인리터 씨의 말을 잘 들어서 조금 복잡한 기분이에요….

1100700778.english: - Rhein Ritter is amazing, even tho he didn't replace the module...
1100700778.korean: - 라인리터는 모듈을 교체한 것도 아닌데, 대단하네….

1100700779.english: Master, I will prepare the tea. How about going inside instead of standing and talking?
1100700779.korean: 주인님, 차를 준비하겠습니다. 서서 대화 나누시는 것보다 안으로 들어가시는 게 어떠실지요?

1100700781.english: - I went into Magical MoMo's room and sat on the chair.
1100700781.korean: - 나는 모모의 방에 들어가 의자에 앉았다.

1100700782.english: So, what brings you here today?

1100700783.english: - I talked about including Serena in today's operation.
1100700783.korean: - 나는 사레나를 오늘 작전에 참여시키는 것에 대해 애기했다.

1100700786.english: I don't think Marie-san would mind...
1100700786.korean: 마리 씨는 신경 쓰지 않을 텐데요….

1100700787.english: If you insist on saying it that way, then I will. You made a magical girl lie... Tsk! It is!
1100700787.korean: 그렇게까지 말씀하신다면, 그렇게 하겠지만... 마법소녀에게 거짓말을 시키시다니… 떽! 이에요!

1100700788.english: - Magical MoMo speaking while pretending to be a little angry.
1100700788.korean: - 조금 화난 척을 하며 말하는 모모.

1100700790.english: - At that moment, Vanilla A1 came into the room with tea.
1100700790.korean: - 그때 바닐라가 차를 준비해 방으로 들어왔다.

1100700791.english: Is that so? But since you've gone to the trouble of preparing tea, why don't you rest for a bit?
1100700791.korean: 그런가요. 하지만 기껏 차도 준비해 왔는데, 조금 쉬시는 게 어떤가요?

1100700792.english: - As she said that, what she placed on the table was hot chocolate.
1100700792.korean: - 그렇게 말하며 테이블에 내려놓은 것은 핫초코였다.

1100700794.english: - After the three of us had been chatting and enjoying hot chocolate (just me) for a while, Magical MoMo suddenly looked like something had occurred to her.
1100700794.korean: - 한동안 셋이서 이야기를 나누며 핫초코(나만)를 즐기던 도중, 모모가 무언가 떠오른 듯한 표정을 지었다.

1100700796.english: Since I'm not on duty today either, would it be alright if I participated in the operation as well? I want to stay by Ms. Sarena's side... It'll probably be hard if you're alone.
1100700796.korean: 오늘은 저도 출격이 없으니, 기왕이면 저도 작전에 참여해도 될까요? 사레나 씨 곁에 있어 주고 싶어서요…. 아마 혼자 있으면 힘들 거예요.

1100700797.english: - Magical MoMo said, holding the cup of tea as if wrapping it with both hands.
1100700797.korean: - 모모는 차가 들어 있는 컵을 양손으로 감싸듯 잡으며 말했다.

1100700798.english: - Hmm... I generally don't want to take unnecessary risks, but... I also understand Magical MoMo's point...
1100700798.korean: - 음~… 웬만하면 불필요한 위험은 감수하고 싶지 않지만… 모모의 말도 이해가 된다…

1100700799.english: - Certainly... it must be painful to just stand by and do nothing while your enemy is right in front of you.
1100700799.korean: - 확실히… 자기 원수가 코앞에 있는데 혼자서 아무것도 하지 않고 기다리는 것도 괴로운 일일지도 모른다.

1100700800.english: Thank you! Since Faucre the Evil Overlord might want to go too, can I ask him to come with us?
1100700800.korean: 감사합니다! 뽀끄루도 어쩌면 가고 싶어 할지도 모르니까 같이 가자고 얘기해 봐도 되나요?

1100700804.english: - So far, things are going smoothly, and the Horde of the First Reconnaissance Unit is currently approaching the Stalker.
1100700804.korean: - 현재까지는 순조롭게 흘러가고 있으며, 제1토벌부대의 호드가 스토커에게 접근하고 있는 참이다.

1100700805.english: - If nothing happens, Khan the Swift will take care of the stalker.
1100700805.korean: - 이대로 아무 일 없다면, 칸이 스토커를 처리하게 되겠지.

1100700806.english: I received a call from Ms. Aeda. The stalker has begun moving.
1100700806.korean: 에이다 씨로부터 연락이 왔습니다. 스토커가 이동을 개시.

1100700807.english: At the same time, a large Ironworm is heading toward the Horde.
1100700807.korean: 그와 동시에 대형 철충이 호드에게 향하고 있습니다.

1100700808.english: Okay, I understand. Because this was the real thing from the beginning.

1100700809.english: Second Extermination Unit, did you hear that?

1100700810.english: Yes. Second Extermination Unit, commencing action. Let's go, Shade.
1100700810.korean: 네. 제2토벌부대, 행동을 개시합니다. 가자, 쉐이드.

1100700812.english: - AL Phantom... Did they really go into battle wearing that outfit...?
1100700812.korean: - 팬텀……. 그 의상 그대로 출격한 건가…….

1100700813.english: - Anyway, this time we deliberately used the Horde's breakthrough force as bait. The second subjugation force, centered around AL Phantom and Shade, is the real power, and they attack the stalker who has distanced himself from Khan the Swift and let his guard down.
1100700813.korean: - 어쨌든 이번에는 호드의 돌파력을 일부러 미끼로 삼았다. 팬텀, 쉐이드를 주축으로 한 제2토벌부대가 진짜 전력으로, 칸과 거리를 벌리고 방심해 있는 스토커를 공격한다.

1100700817.english: - The excellent combo attack by AL Phantom and Shade didn't give the Stalker a chance to react.
1100700817.korean: - 팬텀과 쉐이드의 훌륭한 연계 공격은 스토커가 행동할 틈을 주지 않았다.

1100700825.english: - The stalker forced the railgun shot, but it was impossible for it to hit the Shade and AL Phantom who were already right in front of them.
1100700825.korean: - 스토커는 무리해서 레일건을 쏘았지만 이미 지척에 와 있는 쉐이드와 팬텀에게 맞을 리 없었다.

1100700827.english: Last Final Black AL Phantom Shu... what?!
1100700827.korean: 라스트 파이널 블랙 팬텀 슈… 뭣?!

1100700828.english: - Just as AL Phantom leaped to deliver the final blow, a massive Ironworm suddenly intervened, as if to block the Stalker!
1100700828.korean: - 팬텀이 마지막 일격을 가하려고 뛰어오른 순간 대형 철충이 스토커를 가로막듯 끼어들었다!

1100700829.english: - The final blows of AL Phantom and Shade are stopped, and the giant Ironworm is shattered.
1100700829.korean: - 팬텀과 쉐이드의 최후의 일격이 저지되고, 대형 철충이 산산조각난다.

1100700830.english: - And taking advantage of that single moment of opening, a large number of flying Iron-Blooded Beasts surged forward!
1100700830.korean: - 그리고 그 한순간의 틈을 타고 비행형 철충이 대량으로 쇄도했다!

1100700833.english: - As Shade and AL Phantom jumped back to create distance, a large number of flying Ironworm surrounded the Stalker...!"
1100700833.korean: - 쉐이드와 팬텀이 거리를 벌리기 위해 뒤로 뛰자, 대량의 비행형 철충들이 스토커를 감쌌다……!

1100700834.english: What on earth is going on...?

1100700835.english: - I have a bad feeling... I'd love to blow away the stalker and everything else, but the only members here right now are the ones who specialize in hand-to-hand combat.
1100700835.korean: - 안 좋은 예감이 든다……. 스토커까지 통째로 날려버리고 싶지만, 지금 여기에는 격투전이 특기인 대원밖에 없다.

1100700836.english: - While I was thinking if there was anything I could do, the flying Iron Worms flew away...
1100700836.korean: - 뭔가 방법이 없을지 생각하는 사이에 비행형 철충들이 날아갔고….

1100700839.english: - The AL Phantom is dejected, but we pushed it to the brink of defeat. You did really well.
1100700839.korean: - 팬텀은 풀죽어 있지만, 격파 직전까지 몰아붙였었다. 정말 잘해주었다.

1100700840.english: - Okay, so... what should we do now...?

1100700841.english: The flying Iron Blooded Ones are still in flight. Judging by the speed, it seems like they're moving the stalker.
1100700841.korean: 비행형 철충은 여전히 비행 중이에요. 속도로 미루어보아 스토커를 옮기고 있는 것 같아요.

1100700842.english: The altitude is a bit high, and the artillery position isn't good either... A sniper could attack, but they'd be blocked because a large number of Iron Blooded Ones are surrounding it.
1100700842.korean: 고도가 조금 높은 데다 포병의 위치도 좋지 않네요… 스나이퍼라면 공격할 수 있지만, 철충이 대량으로 감싸고 있기 때문에 가로막힐 거예요.

1100700843.english: - We had fewer air power due to being wary of his sniper, and the gunners were positioned away from the stalker...
1100700843.korean: - 녀석의 저격을 경계하느라 공중전력 수가 적었고, 캐노니어도 스토커에서 떨어진 위치에 배치해 둔 상태…

1100700844.english: - Has the operation targeting only the stalker completely fallen apart?
1100700844.korean: - 스토커만을 노린 작전이 완전히 틀어져 버렸나.

1100700845.english: - The screen showed the stalker's current location, which was heading toward the supply units in the rear.
1100700845.korean: - 스크린에는 스토커의 현재 위치가 표시되고 있었고, 그 위치는 후방의 보급 부대 쪽으로 향하고 있었다.

1100700846.english: (Rewinding the clock a bit, one hour after the operation began)
1100700846.korean: (시간을 조금 거슬러 올라가, 작전 개시 1시간 후)

1100700849.english: - I'm here in the operation area for the stalker extermination operation, following Magical MoMo and Faucre. Right now, I'm moving with the supply unit as I please.
1100700849.korean: - 나는 모모 씨와 뽀끄루 씨를 따라서 스토커 토벌 작전의 작전 구역에 와 있다. 지금은 멋대로 보급 부대와 함께 이동하고 있다.

1100700850.english: - I heard Captain Indomitable Marie said she couldn't participate...
1100700850.korean: - 마리 대장이라는 사람이 참여할 수 없다고 했는데….

1100700851.english: Um... I was told I shouldn't go...
1100700851.korean: 저기… 저는 가면 안 된다고 들었는데요….

1100700852.english: I see. Didn't you want to go?

1100700853.english: Well... it's not exactly like that, but... the director wouldn't know either...
1100700853.korean: 그… 그런 건 아니지만… 감독님도 모르실 테고…

1100700854.english: Hmm... then... it's a secret from the director!

1100700855.english: That's right. Let's keep it a secret! The director will understand too!
1100700855.korean: 그렇네요. 비밀로 해 버리죠! 감독님도 이해해 주실 거예요!

1100700857.english: - Am I going to get scolded? Anyway, Captain Indomitable Marie was really scary. However, even if I can't defeat it with my own hands, I still want to see that Metal Parasite fall. For now, I've decided to accept Magical MoMo and Faucre's kindness...
1100700857.korean: - 혼나는 거 아닐까? 감독님은 어쨌든, 마리 대장은 정말 무서웠다. 하지만, 역시 내 손으로 쓰러뜨리진 못하더라도, 그 철충이 쓰러지는 모습 정도는 보고 싶다. 지금은 모모 씨와 뽀끄루 씨의 호의를 받아들이기로 했다….

1100700858.english: Um... if you're going to follow, could I ask for your protection?
1100700858.korean: 저기…… 따라오실 거라면, 호위를 부탁드려도 될까요?

1100700859.english: Oh... Okay! Leave it to me!

1100700860.english: - I don't know how far away it is, but I can hear gunshots and explosions... That's where the Metal Parasite... the Stalker... is.
1100700860.korean: - 얼마나 떨어져 있는지는 모르겠지만, 총성과 폭발음이 들려온다… 그곳에 그 철충… 스토커가 있다….

1100700861.english: - The director said he would definitely take him down...

1100700862.english: - Magical MoMo... Magical BaekTo... Faucre the Evil Overlord...

1100700863.english: We have to wait here. Thank you for escorting me.
1100700863.korean: 저희는 여기서 대기해야 해요. 호위해 주셔서 감사했습니다.

1100700864.english: Oh, no... I'm sorry, T-50 PX Silky, I just...
1100700864.korean: 아, 아뇨…. 갑자기 죄송했어요, 실키 씨…….

1100700865.english: Don't worry about it. Because I was grateful for your protection. It was nice talking to you.
1100700865.korean: 신경 쓰지 마세요. 호위해 주셔서 감사했으니까요. 얘기 나눌 수 있어서 좋았어요.

1100700866.english: - The gunshots and explosions are closer than before...

1100700868.english: Huh...? What is that...? A horde of Iron Blobs...?

1100700870.english: - Looking up, there was something like a black cloud floating. Looking closely, it was indeed a large number of Iron Blooded Ones, just as T-50 PX Silky had said.
1100700870.korean: - 위를 보자 검은 구름 같은 게 떠 있었다. 자세히 보니 실키 씨의 말대로 대량의 철충이었다.

1100700873.english: I just got a call from the captain. It seems there's a stalker in there! The supply unit says to evacuate!
1100700873.korean: 방금 대장에게 연락이 왔어요. 저 안에 스토커가 있다는 모양이에요! 보급부대는 대피하라고 합니다!

1100700875.english: Yes! Ms. Serena, could I ask for your escort?
1100700875.korean: 네! 사레나 씨, 호위를 부탁드릴 수 있을까요?

1100700876.english: - That Metal Parasite is in there...

1100700878.english: Ms. Sarena, let's move. It might interfere with the operation.
1100700878.korean: 사레나 씨, 이동하죠. 작전에 방해될지도 몰라요.

1100700880.english: Yes... Okay, I understand. Lee Dong-ha—

1100700881.english: Oh! Just a moment! I'm falling!!!

1100700882.english: - It looked like a black mass was coming toward us, and then suddenly, as if vomited out, a stalker descended from within it...!
1100700882.korean: - 검은 덩어리가 우리 근처로 오는가 싶더니, 갑자기 그 안에서 스토커가 토해내지듯 낙하해 왔다…!

1100700885.english: - The supply unit evacuated, and a stalker landed dozens of meters in front of me.
1100700885.korean: - 보급부대가 대피했고, 내 수십 미터 앞에 스토커가 착지했다.

1100700890.english: - Magical MoMo and Faucre the Evil Overlord ran to my side.
1100700890.korean: - 모모 씨와 뽀끄루 씨가 내 곁으로 달려왔다.

1100700891.english: Ms. Serena, is that... the Metal Parasite?

1100700893.english: - That wound on his head is the mark of the lance I gave him... That's definitely the Metal Parasite... I don't know why it fell in front of my eyes...
1100700893.korean: - 저 머리의 상처는 내가 드릴 랜스로 도려낸 흔적이다…. 그 철충이 확실하다……. 왜 내 눈앞에 떨어진 건지는 알 수 없다….

1100700895.english: - For some reason, tears just started flowing...

1100700896.english: - The scene from that time came back to me. The scene where everyone had fallen and only I was left standing against them...
1100700896.korean: - 그때의 광경이 떠올라버렸다. 모두가 쓰러지고, 나만이 대치하고 있던 그 풍경이….

1100700898.english: - The emotions from that time come flooding back. Magical MoMo...

1100700899.english: Ms. Serena. It's okay. Magical MoMo is here.
1100700899.korean: 사레나 씨. 괜찮아요. 모모는 여기 있어요.

1100700903.english: - The scene and emotions that had been filling my mind were scattered by the two people's words.
1100700903.korean: - 머릿속을 가득 채워가던 그 광경과 감정이 두 사람의 말에 흩어졌다.

1100700906.english: I don't have time. I'll keep it short. Can Magical MoMo and Faucre the Evil Overlord hear it too?
1100700906.korean: 시간이 없어. 짧게 말할게. 모모와 뽀끄루도 들리지?

1100700909.english: That guy is almost dead. If possible, I want to defeat them here. I'll be in charge of you. Would that be okay?
1100700909.korean: 그 녀석은 거의 빈사 상태야. 가능하면 여기서 쓰러뜨리고 싶어. 내가 너를 지휘할게. 그래도 될까?

1100700911.english: All available forces to the battlefield! The operatives capable of antiaircraft combat, shoot down the flying Iron Worms! Support Sarena!
1100700911.korean: 모든 가용 병력은 전투현장으로! 대공이 가능한 대원은 비행형 철충을 격추! 사레나를 원호해!

1100700913.english: - Several voices were heard. The director's voice, Magical MoMo's voice, Faucre the Evil Overlord's voice, the voices of all the crew members...
1100700913.korean: - 여러 목소리가 들렸다. 감독님의 목소리, 모모 씨의 목소리, 뽀끄루 씨의 목소리, 대원 여러분의 목소리….

1100700914.english: - The me of now... is not alone.

1100700915.english: I'll finish it in one blow!

1100700918.english: - I raised my drill lance to charge. Then, as if sensing that, a large number of flying Iron-Blooded Beasts surged toward us.
1100700918.korean: - 나는 돌격하기 위해 드릴 랜스를 들었다. 그러자, 그걸 감지한 건지 대량의 비행형 철충들이 우리를 향해 쇄도했다.

1100700920.korean: 후하하하하하하하!!! 사라져라, 사라져! 수준 낮은 잔챙이들!!

1100700921.english: - The iron-blooded beasts surrounding them are falling one by one under their attacks and the snipers nearby.
1100700921.korean: - 주위에 있던 철충들이 둘의 공격과 주변의 저격에 하나둘 쓰러져간다.

1100700922.english: - The stalker in front of me, as if remembering "that time," ran backward.
1100700922.korean: - 눈앞의 스토커는 "그때'를 기억해 냈는지, 뒤로 뛰었다.

1100700923.english: This time for sure! I won't let you get away!!!

1100700924.english: - I ignited the booster. My heavy body lifted off in an instant and shot forward like a shell.
1100700924.korean: - 나는 부스터에 불을 붙였다. 무거운 몸이 한순간 떠오르며 포탄처럼 발사되었다.

1100700925.english: - The white part of the stalker's eyes shone like "then." I know what that movement is...!
1100700925.korean: - 스토커의 흰 부분이 "그때"처럼 빛났다. 그 움직임이 뭔지는 알고 있다…!

1100700927.english: - I braced myself and thrust my chest armor toward the ground.
1100700927.korean: - 나는 몸에 제동을 걸어 가슴의 아머를 지면을 향해 내뻗었다.

1100700928.english: - At the same time, a bullet shot out from the stalker like a laser and hit my armor directly in the blink of an eye.
1100700928.korean: - 그와 동시에 스토커에게서 마치 레이저처럼 탄환이 발사되어 눈 깜짝할 사이에 내 아머에 직격했다.

1100700930.english: - Clenching my teeth tightly, I endure the impact and deploy the booster again! The distance between me and the stalker is now less than 20 meters!
1100700930.korean: - 이를 꽉 깨물며 그 충격을 버텨내고 다시 부스터를 전개한다! 스토커와의 거리는 이제 20미터도 채 되지 않는다!

1100700932.english: - I thrust out my drill lance. This time, I'll definitely hit it! I won't miss it! Never...!
1100700932.korean: - 드릴 랜스를 내질렀다. 이번에야말로 명중시키겠어! 놓치지 않아! 절대로……!

1100700935.english: - My body collided with the stalker. A tremendous roar echoed around.
1100700935.korean: - 내 몸은 스토커에게 충돌했다. 어마어마한 굉음이 주변에 울려 퍼졌다.

1100700936.english: - The drill lance pierced the stalker's torso, and its cannon-like arm, which had fired the bullet, shattered under the impact.
1100700936.korean: - 드릴 랜스가 스토커의 동체를 꿰뚫었고, 탄환을 쏜 대포 같은 팔은 그 충격을 버티지 못하고 산산이 부서졌다.

1100700941.english: - She gripped her dented armor and drew her drill lance.
1100700941.korean: - 찌그러진 아머를 파지하고, 드릴 랜스를 뽑아냈다.

1100700942.english: - The stalker had a large hole in him, and it was clear to anyone that he was dead.
1100700942.korean: - 스토커는 큰 구멍이 뚫려 있었고, 누가 봐도 죽은 상태였다.

1100700944.english: - Magical MoMo... Faucre the Evil Overlord... Magical BaekTo...

1100700948.english: Ms. Serena~! I did it~! I did it, I did it~!

1100700949.english: That's amazing!! You knocked him down!! Congratulations!!

1100700950.english: Go... thank you. It's all thanks to you...

1100700956.english: - After the stalker elimination operation, I took a day off and resumed filming.
1100700956.korean: - 스토커 토벌 작전 후, 하루 쉬고 촬영을 재개했다.

1100700957.english: - The filming went smoothly, partly because there were no interruptions from the Iron Bugs. Of course, it's much later than originally planned, but... Since then, the atmosphere in Sarena seems to have brightened somehow.
1100700957.korean: - 철충의 방해가 없기도 해서 촬영은 순조롭게 진행되었다. 물론 처음의 예정보다는 많이 늦어졌지만……. 그 후로 사레나의 분위기도 어쩐지 밝아진 것 같다.

1100700958.english: - Although it might sound like a conclusion based on results, that fight was probably necessary for Serena.
1100700958.korean: - 결과론이 되어버리긴 하지만, 사레나에게 그 싸움은 필요한 것이었겠지.

1100700959.english: Good morning. Finally, the day has come.

1100700960.english: As I entered the studio, the staff waiting inside greeted me with a bow. Cardinal Armand, who was closest, greeted me with a big smile on his face.
1100700960.korean: - 스튜디오에 들어가자, 안에서 기다리고 있던 스태프들이 마주 인사해주었다. 가장 가까이에 있던 아르망이 만면에 미소를 지으며 나를 맞이해 주었다.

1100700961.english: - Today is finally the last day of filming. Once this shoot is over, it's a wrap.
1100700961.korean: - 오늘은 드디어 촬영 마지막 날이다. 이 촬영이 끝나면 크랭크업이다.

1100700963.english: - I felt a sense of unease and looked around.

1100700965.english: - Usually, that guy would be excited and running toward me, but I don't see him...
1100700965.korean: - 평소라면 흥분해서 내게 달려올 그 녀석이 보이지 않는다….

1100700966.english: If it were Mr. EB-48G Hraesvelgr, he would have volunteered to go on reconnaissance.

1100700967.english: I think so. I really received a lot of help from that person.
1100700967.korean: 그런 것 같아요. 그 분에게는 정말 도움을 많이 받았네요.

1100700968.english: The fact that we were able to film so smoothly is all thanks to her being there as an advisor. I never imagined that the mere appearance of Goltarion VIII would cause such a significant error in Mr. Magical BaekTo's behavior prediction.
1100700968.korean: 이렇게 순조롭게 촬영할 수 있었던 것도 모두 그녀가 조언자로 있어 준 덕분이에요. 골타리온 Ⅷ세라는 존재가 나타난 것만으로 백토 씨의 행동 예측에 그렇게 큰 오차가 생길 줄은 생각도 못 했어요.

1100700969.english: Heh heh, I bet you'd say, "If I can just see Magical MoMo's new movie, that's enough for me."
1100700969.korean: 후후, "모모의 신작 영화를 볼 수 있다면 그걸로 만족해요"라고 할 것 같은걸요?

1100700970.english: - At that moment, Machina and Mery, who had been working hard behind the stage the whole time, came to see me.
1100700970.korean: - 그때, 줄곧 무대 뒤에서 애써 주었던 마키나와 메리가 찾아왔다.

1100700973.english: Thank you both again. If we had physically made all the sets and tools, we wouldn't have been able to shoot this quickly.
1100700973.korean: 두 분에게도 다시 한번 감사드려요. 물리적으로 모든 세트와 도구를 만들었다면, 이렇게 빨리 촬영을 진행할 수 없었을 거예요.

1100700974.english: No, we were also happy to be able to help with Dentsu's work, and it's great that you're pleased as well.
1100700974.korean: 아뇨, 저희도 덴세츠의 작품을 도울 수 있어서 즐거웠던 데다, 역시 여러분이 기뻐해 주시니 좋네요.

1100700975.english: Yes! If I can be helpful in this way, I'm always happy to help! For someone, and if many people see it, as a painter, there's nothing more fulfilling!"
1100700975.korean: 네! 이런 식으로 도움이 될 수 있다면 언제든지 도와드릴게요!&n누군가를 위해서 그리고, 많은 사람이 봐 준다면, 그림을 그리는 사람으로서 더없이 행복한 일인걸요!

1100700976.english: - Everyone is smiling beautifully. That's really fortunate.
1100700976.korean: - 다들 멋진 미소를 짓고 있다. 정말 다행이야.

1100700977.english: I've been behind you since earlier.

1100700978.english: - Let's turn around. Azaz was looking at me with a bewildered expression.
1100700978.korean: - 돌아보자 아자즈가 어리둥절한 얼굴로 나를 보고 있었다.

1100700979.english: No, it's not. Honestly, I've been having the best days. Thank you isn't enough.
1100700979.korean: 아뇨, 아니에요. 솔직히 말해서 최고의 나날을 보냈는걸요. 고마워해도 부족할 정도예요.

1100700980.english: I never thought I'd get to see the new Goltarion. I'll be able to focus on building models.
1100700980.korean: 신형 골타리온을 볼 수 있을 줄은 생각도 못했는걸요. 모형 만들기에 정진할 수 있겠어요.

1100700981.english: This time, the design that captured Ms. Serena's likeness became Goltarion VIII, but I plan to build the model to recreate the VIII seen in the materials.
1100700981.korean: 이번에는 사레나 씨의 모습을 살린 디자인이 골타리온 Ⅷ세가 되었지만, 모형은 자료에 나온 Ⅷ세를 재현해서 만들 생각이에요.

1100700982.english: If the director gives me the okay, I'll make a proper VIII, but the cost is a bit of an issue...
1100700982.korean: 감독님께서 허락만 해주신다면, 제대로 Ⅷ세를 만들겠지만… 비용이 조금 문제가 되네요…

1100700983.english: - That expression means they'll really do it if they can... Let's just dodge the answer.
1100700983.korean: - 이 표정은 만들 수 있다면 진짜로 만들겠다는 표정이다… 대답은 얼버무려두자.

1100700984.english: Yes, really. ...Well, they say even tigers come when you mention them.
1100700984.korean: 네, 정말로요. …어라, 호랑이도 제 말 하면 온다더니.

1100700986.english: Yes... I never dreamed this day would come...
1100700986.korean: 네… 이런 날이 올 줄은 꿈에도 몰랐어요…

1100700987.english: So many people have helped me like this... Everyone... Everyone... sob...
1100700987.korean: 이렇게 많은 분께서 도와주셔서… 다들… 다들… 흐윽…

1100700988.english: That's right. You're going to be playing Goltarion VIII from now on, so tears aren't appropriate.
1100700988.korean: 맞아요. 당신은 지금부터 골타리온 Ⅷ세를 연기해야 하니까 눈물은 어울리지 않아요.

1100700989.english: - Cardinal Armand's words were met with agreement from the other people there.
1100700989.korean: - 아르망의 말에 그곳에 있던 다른 사람들도 수긍했다.

1100700991.english: Okay, we'll go wait for the shoot, so we'll be going now...
1100700991.korean: 그럼, 저희는 촬영 대기하러 갈 테니 이만…

1100700992.english: Let's work hard together! Ms. Serena!

1100700993.english: I'll just leisurely observe the filming.

1100700994.english: - Machina, Mery went back to her seat, and Azaz headed to the corner of the studio.
1100700994.korean: - 마키나, 메리가 자신의 자리로 돌아가고, 아자즈는 스튜디오 구석으로 향했다.

1100700995.english: Okay, I'll go and do the final checks at each location as well.
1100700995.korean: 그럼, 저도 각 장소의 최종 확인을 하러 가 볼게요.

1100700996.english: - Elsewhere, filming is already underway for the magical girl team and the Faucre the Evil Overlord party.
1100700996.korean: - 다른 곳에서는 이미 마법 소녀 팀과 뽀끄루 일행의 촬영이 이루어지고 있다.

1100700997.english: - This studio will be filming the scene where Magical MoMo and Faucre the Evil Overlord fight together to defeat Goltarion VIII.
1100700997.korean: - 이 스튜디오에서는 모모와 뽀끄루가 골타리온 Ⅷ세를 쓰러뜨리기 위해 함께 싸운다…라는 장면을 촬영할 예정이다.

1100700998.english: - If the filming is going well, the line reader will be leading everyone to the studio.
1100700998.korean: - 촬영이 잘 진행되고 있다면, 라인리터가 모두를 이끌고 스튜디오로 오고 있을 것이다.

1100701000.english: - A moment later, Cardinal Armand raised his voice.

1100701001.english: Everyone! As planned, Ms. Magical MoMo and his party are arriving! We will proceed according to the contents of Chart A without changing the plan!
1100701001.korean: 여러분! 예정대로 모모 씨 일행이 오고 있어요! 플랜 변경 없이 A 차트의 내용대로 진행합니다!

1100701002.english: Ms. Sarena, please start waiting at your designated position.
1100701002.korean: 사레나 씨, 슬슬 정해진 위치에서 대기해 주세요.

1100701004.english: - Sarena answered, took a deep breath, and looked at me. Her serious expression was so dignified that you wouldn't have thought she had been crying just moments before.
1100701004.korean: - 사레나는 대답하고 심호흡을 한 뒤 나를 바라보았다. 그 진지한 표정은 방금까지 울고 있었다고는 생각할 수 없을 정도로 늠름했다.

1100701005.english: Director. Thank you so much for everything so far.

1100701008.english: - "Sarena said that and then, as if to psych herself up, pounded her chest with a large fist.
1100701008.korean: - 사레나는 그렇게 말하고, 기합을 넣듯 자기 가슴을 커다란 주먹으로 두드렸다.

1100701010.english: - From that moment on, her face became not Sarena, but Goltarion VIII.
1100701010.korean: - 그녀의 얼굴은 그 순간부터 사레나가 아니라 골타리온 Ⅷ세가 되었다.

1100701013.english: - The Line Riders burst in, smashing down the door.

1100701014.english: - The studio completely recreated the great hall of Goltarion VIII using a combination of Machina's hologram and the set built by Azaz's group.
1100701014.korean: - 스튜디오는 마키나의 홀로그램과 아자즈 일행이 만든 세트의 조합으로 골타리온 Ⅷ세의 거성이 완전히 재현되어 있었다.

1100701015.english: - Magical BaekTo, who had followed Rhein Ritter, shouted while flashing his Shining Pink Moonlight.
1100701015.korean: - 라인리터를 따라 도착한 백토가 샤이닝 핑크 문라이트를 번뜩이며 외쳤다.

1100701017.english: Heh heh heh... I let it slide back then, but you've come here specifically to die! Magical Girl!
1100701017.korean: 큭큭큭…. 그때는 특별히 눈감아 주었거늘, 굳이 죽으러 찾아왔구나! 마법소녀!

1100701018.english: - As Sarena swung her massive arms like a villain, subordinates made of Machina's hologram appeared before BaekTo and his group.
1100701018.korean: - 사레나가 악역답게 거대한 팔을 휘두르자, 백토 일행의 앞에 마키나의 홀로그램으로 만든 부하들이 나타났다.

1100701019.english: Ugh! Are those his subordinates? Magical MoMo! BaekTo! Don't let your guard down!
1100701019.korean: 큭! 녀석의 부하들인가! 모모! 백토! 방심은 금물입니다!

1100701020.english: Hmph, these little runts are no match for this deity! Let's go! Goltarion!
1100701020.korean: 흥, 이런 잔챙이들은 본좌의 적수가 되지 못한다! 가자! 골타리온!

1100701021.english: Yes! Faucre the Evil Overlord! Goltarion VIII! Those who defy the Great Demon King, no matter how many they are, will not be forgiven! Get ready!
1100701021.korean: 네! 뽀끄루 대마왕님! 골타리온 Ⅷ세! 대마왕님을 거역하는 자는 그게 몇 명이든 용서하지 않는다! 각오해라!

1100701022.english: Hmph! You should already know that you can't defeat me! So you're still going to attack?!
1100701022.korean: 흥! 네 녀석이 나를 쓰러뜨릴 수 없다는 것 정도는 이미 알고 있을 텐데! 그래도 덤비겠다는 건가?!

1100701023.english: Hoo-ha-ha-ha-ha! That's ridiculous! It's not me who will defeat you! Magical girls! This time, I'll clear the path! Go!
1100701023.korean: 후하하하핫! 우습군! 네 녀석을 쓰러뜨리는 건 내가 아니다! 마법소녀들이여! 이번에는 내가 길을 열겠다! 가라!

1100701024.english: I'll pay this debt later. Goltarion!

1100701026.english: - The magical girls defeat the holographic enemies and approach Serena.
1100701026.korean: - 마법소녀들이 홀로그램 적을 물리치며 사레나에게 다가간다.

1100701027.english: - The subordinates of Goltarion VIII are described as 'insubstantial, mind-damaging ghosts'.
1100701027.korean: - 골타리온 Ⅷ세의 부하들은 '실체가 없고 정신에 대미지를 주는 유령' 이라는 설정이다.

1100701028.english: - So, BaekTo and Goltarion, who are unaffected even when attacked, were set up as having strong minds that prevent them from taking damage.
1100701028.korean: - 그래서 공격당해도 아무렇지도 않은 백토와 골타리온은 마음이 강해서 대미지를 받지 않는 것으로 해 두었다.

1100701029.english: - Conversely, Magical MoMo and Faucre are set to be soft-hearted and take damage, so BaekTo and Goltarion were made to fight while protecting Magical MoMo and Faucre.
1100701029.korean: - 반대로 모모와 뽀끄루는 마음이 여려서 대미지를 받는다는 설정으로, 백토와 골타리온이 모모와 뽀끄루를 지키며 싸우도록 유도했다.

1100701030.english: - The Setting we all came up with was working well.
1100701030.korean: - 다 같이 생각해 낸 설정이 잘 기능하고 있었다.

1100701031.english: If you know it's not real, there's nothing to be afraid of! Your attacks won't work on me!
1100701031.korean: 실체가 없다는 걸 알고 있으면, 무서워할 필요도 없지! 너희의 공격은 내게는 통하지 않는다!

1100701032.english: That's right! Your attacks are all mental attacks! With my burning loyalty to the Great Demon King, such tricks won't work on me! Hahaha!
1100701032.korean: 그렇다! 네놈들의 공격은 모두 정신 공격! 대마왕님을 향한 불타오르는 충성심으로 무장한 나에게 그런 수작이 통할 리 없지! 후하하하!

1100701033.english: - Magical BaekTo and Goltarion XIII cut down their enemies one by one. Watching them work so seamlessly together, you'd never guess they were usually enemies.
1100701033.korean: - 백토와 골타리온 XIII세는 적들을 차례차례 베어 쓰러뜨렸다. 손발이 척척 맞는 그 모습에서 평소에 서로 적이었다는 사실은 전혀 느껴지지 않았다.

1100701034.english: Their strong hearts! It's the key! Break thru! Magical MoMo to where the eighth is! Please take me!
1100701034.korean: 저 둘의 강한 마음이! 열쇠예요! 뚫고 나아가세요! 모모를 Ⅷ세가 있는 곳까지! 데려가 주세요!!

1100701035.english: - The two of them let out a thunderous roar and charged forward, attacking with increasing ferocity. However, Sarena once again swung her massive arm, summoning a large number of subordinates.
1100701035.korean: - 둘은 우렁찬 함성을 내지르고, 점점 더 격렬하게 공격하며 뚫고 나아갔다. 하지만, 사레나는 또다시 거대한 팔을 휘둘러 부하를 대량으로 소환했다.

1100701037.english: - At the command of their superior, Sarena, the subordinate demons charged at Magical MoMo and Faucre the Evil Overlord, who were behind Magical BaekTo and Goltarion XIII!
1100701037.korean: - 부하인 마물들은 사레나의 호령과 동시에 백토와 골타리온 XIII세의 뒤에 있는 모모와 뽀끄루에게 달려들었다!

1100701042.english: - Hearing the screams of Magical MoMo and Faucre the Evil Overlord, whose attacks were effective, Magical BaekTo and Goltarion quickly retreated.
1100701042.korean: - 부하들의 공격이 통하는 모모와 뽀끄루의 비명을 듣고 백토와 골타리온은 서둘러 퇴각한다.

1100701043.english: Cowardly...! Fight fair and square! Eighth generation!

1100701044.english: - Cutting down the subordinates swarming around Magical MoMo, BaekTo shouted.
1100701044.korean: - 모모에게 몰려드는 부하들을 베어 넘기며 백토가 소리쳤다.

1100701045.english: Damn it... If only I had the strength to defeat her...!
1100701045.korean: 제길…. 내게 녀석을 쓰러뜨릴 힘이 있었다면……!

1100701047.english: Hoo-ha-ha-ha-ha... You'll regret it... Be afraid!

1100701048.english: Whew... Wait a moment, magical girls. How about you leave this to me?
1100701048.korean: 후…. 잠시 기다려라, 마법소녀들. 여기는 내게 맡기는 게 어때.

1100701049.english: Faucre the Great Demon King... Is there some way...?
1100701049.korean: 뽀끄루 대마왕…. 뭔가 방법이 있는 건가…?

1100701050.english: I've been saving my strength for this moment. If I use my darkness power to its fullest extent, I should be able to eliminate her darkness power...
1100701050.korean: 나는 이때를 위해 지금까지 힘을 아껴 두었다. 최대한으로 높인 내 어둠의 힘이라면, 녀석의 어둠의 힘을 없애버릴 수 있겠지…

1100701051.english: No way, did you anticipate it would come to this...?

1100701052.english: Did you think I was just being quiet because I was scared on the way here? BaekTo?
1100701052.korean: 여기까지 오는 동안 내가 겁이라도 먹어서 얌전히 있던 거라고 생각했나? 백토?

1100701054.english: Hmm... After all, I can't just keep getting pushed around and still save face!! I'll blow away the little guys! Go on that signal! Magical MoMo!!
1100701054.korean: 흥……. 나도 당하기만 해서는 면이 서지 않으니 말이다!! 잔챙이들을 날려버리겠다! 그걸 신호로 가라! 모모!!

1100701055.english: Faucre the Great Demon King... Thank you.

1100701056.english: Don't worry... it just happened that our understanding aligned...
1100701056.korean: 신경 쓰지 마라… 마침 이해가 일치했을 뿐이다…

1100701057.english: - Faucre smiled, showing the dignity of the Great Demon King.
1100701057.korean: - 뽀끄루는 대마왕의 품격을 보이며 싱긋 웃었다.

1100701058.english: Faucre the Great Demon King! Even if you do this, I won't forgive you for returning to the darkness. Once this fight is over, it's your turn next!
1100701058.korean: 뽀끄루 대마왕! 이런다고 어둠으로 돌아간 널 용서하진 않을 거다. 이 싸움이 끝나면 다음은 네 차례다!

1100701059.english: This time, I'll slice you into pieces and completely purify you! Get ready!
1100701059.korean: 이번에야말로 잘게 베어 완전히 정화해 주마! 각오해라!

1100701060.english: - ...said Magical BaekTo to Faucre the Evil Overlord, not acting but with genuine feeling, and Faucre the Evil Overlord's smile faltered slightly...
1100701060.korean: - ……라고 백토가 연기가 아닌 진심을 담아 뽀끄루에게 말하자, 뽀끄루의 웃음이 조금 일그러졌다….

1100701061.english: Hoo, hoohoohoo... Don't worry... it just happened that our understanding aligned...
1100701061.korean: 후, 후후후…. 신경 쓰지 마라… 마침… 이해가 일치했을 뿐이다…

1100701062.english: - I'll have to help Faucre the Evil Overlord later...

1100701063.english: Anyway! ...VIII! This is the ruler of the dark night! It's the power of the Faucre the Evil Overlord! Take this!
1100701063.korean: 어쨌든! …Ⅷ세여! 이것이 어두운 밤의 지배자! 뽀끄루 대마왕의 힘이라는 것이다! 받아라아아아!

1100701064.english: - Faucre the Evil Overlord shouted with all his might and fired a Hell Inferno that had become enormous thru Machina's hologram.
1100701064.korean: - 뽀끄루가 온 힘을 다해 외치며, 마키나의 홀로그램으로 아주 거대해진 헬 인페르노를 쏘았다.

1100701065.english: Oh, oh, oh! The enemy in front of me, in an instant! Magical Girl! Now's your chance! Go!
1100701065.korean: 오오오! 눈앞의 적이 한순간에! 마법소녀! 지금이 기회다! 가라아아!

1100701066.english: Thank you! Faucre the Evil Overlord! Haaaat!

1100701067.english: - At the signal of King Goltarion XIII's voice, Magical MoMo ran.
1100701067.korean: - 골타리온 XIII세의 목소리를 신호로 모모가 뛰었다.

1100701069.english: - Magical MoMo draws her katana and confronts Serena.

1100701070.english: What could a girl like you possibly do?!
1100701070.korean: 네 녀석 같은 계집애가 대체 뭘 할 수 있다는 거지?!

1100701071.english: I'm a magical girl. No matter how strong the enemy is, I won't give up!
1100701071.korean: 저는 마법소녀예요. 아무리 강한 적이라도 포기하지 않아요!

1100701072.english: - Sarena swings a massive drill lance. Magical MoMo dodged it brilliantly, even deflecting it with her katana.
1100701072.korean: - 사레나가 거대한 드릴 랜스를 휘두른다. 모모는 그것을 화려하게 피하고, 카타나로 튕겨내기까지 했다.

1100701073.english: Hoo-ha-ha-ha-hot! How long can you hold out with that stick-like sword?
1100701073.korean: 후하하하하핫! 그 막대기 같은 칼로 얼마나 견딜 수 있을까?

1100701075.english: - Their exchange became increasingly violent and heated. I didn't even realize it, but my hands were sweating too.
1100701075.korean: - 둘의 공방은 점점 과격해졌고, 점점 더 뜨거워졌다. 나도 모르게 내 손에도 땀이 났다.

1100701076.english: - It was clearly acting, but there was no hesitation in their sword fight, and they were exuding a killing intent that made it impossible not to believe it was real.
1100701076.korean: - 분명 연기일 텐데 둘의 칼싸움에는 망설임이 없었고, 진짜라고 생각할 수밖에 없는 살기를 내뿜고 있었다.

1100701077.english: You're doing well for a girl! But this is the end! Die!
1100701077.korean: 계집치고는 잘하는구나! 하지만 이걸로 끝이다! 죽어라!

1100701078.english: - Sarena aimed her giant palm at Magical MoMo. Then, a giant beam made of holograms shot out, and Magical MoMo barely dodged it.
1100701078.korean: - 사레나가 거대한 손바닥을 모모에게 향했다. 그러자 홀로그램으로 만든 거대한 빔이 쏘아졌고 모모는 그것을 가까스로 피했다.

1100701079.english: Ugh... Argh...! There it is! Yaaahhh!!

1100701080.english: - Seizing the momentary opening created by dodging the beam, Magical MoMo raised her katana.
1100701080.korean: - 빔을 피함으로써 생긴 한순간의 틈을 포착한 모모는 카타나를 치켜들었다.

1100701082.english: - The raised katana deflected and sent Sarena's drill lance flying.
1100701082.korean: - 치켜든 카타나는 사레나의 드릴 랜스를 튕겨내 날려버렸다.

1100701084.english: - And Magical MoMo poured her technique into her empty body.
1100701084.korean: - 그리고 모모는 텅 비어버린 몸체에 기술을 때려 넣었다.

1100701085.english: Now is the time!! Now, ultimate move! Magical Shining Six-Blade Slash!!
1100701085.korean: 지금이에요!! 지금, 필살! 매지컬 샤이닝 육렬 베기!!

1100701086.english: Krak?! To a woman like this... !

1100701087.english: - Sarena's front armor was blown off by Magical MoMo's slash!
1100701087.korean: - 모모의 참격에 사레나의 전면 장갑이 날아갔다!

1100701088.english: I might just be a little girl! But, there's something I want to protect!&nFor everyone! I'll fight for my friends! That's it! I'm a magical girl!
1100701088.korean: 저는 그저 어린 여자애일지도 몰라요! 하지만, 저에게는 지키고 싶은 게 있어요!&n모두를 위해! 친구를 위해 싸울 거예요! 그게! 마법소녀예요!

1100701089.english: - Sarena landed at the location for filming the final scene.
1100701089.korean: - 사레나는 마지막 장면을 촬영하기 위한 장소에 착지했다.

1100701091.english: - Momo drew the true Shining Katana... The light of that blade felt like it could cut through darkness itself and end this story.
1100701091.korean: - 모모가 진 샤이닝 카타나를 뽑았다… 그 도신의 빛은 그야말로 어둠을 베고 이 이야기를 끝낼 수 있을 힘이 느껴졌다.

1100701093.english: The previous Moon People who sealed you in the past told me! The way to defeat you!!!
1100701093.korean: 과거에 너를 봉인한 선대 월인들이 알려줬다! 너를 쓰러뜨릴 방법을 말이지!!!

1100701095.english: - The wound on Serena's chest began to glow.

1100701096.english: That wound...! It seems you've forgotten while you were sealed away!! Now's the time! Magical MoMo!
1100701096.korean: 그 상처…! 봉인되어 있던 동안 잊어버린 모양이군!! 지금이야! 모모!

1100701097.english: Putting everyone's hearts into the katana! Now! Super Special Move~!
1100701097.korean: 모두의 마음을 카타나에 담아서! 지금! 초 필살~…!

1100701100.english: - Magical MoMo rushes into Serena's arms as if determined not to miss it. The target is the wound in the chest. The wedge that was restraining her.
1100701100.korean: - 모모는 그것을 놓치지 않겠다는 듯 사레나의 품으로 돌진한다. 목표는 가슴의 상처. 그녀를 구속하고 있던 쐐기.

1100701103.english: - The katana glowed with a hologram, and Magical MoMo, who had charged forward, was swallowed by a torrent of light. It pierced Serena's heart like a shooting star.
1100701103.korean: - 카타나가 홀로그램에 의해 빛났고, 돌진한 모모는 빛의 격류에 삼켜졌다. 그것은 마치 유성처럼 사레나의 가슴에 꽂혔다.

1100701105.english: - Sarena screamed. He screamed as Goltarion VIII. It felt like I was really being pierced by a katana. And the terminal scream that exudes an evil atmosphere.
1100701105.korean: - 사레나는 비명을 질렀다. 골타리온 Ⅷ세로서 비명을 질렀다. 마치 정말로 카타나에 꿰뚫린 것 같은 고통. 그리고 마의 분위기를 풍기는 단말마.

1100701106.english: - Simultaneously, a glowing blade created by a hologram pierces her back.
1100701106.korean: - 그와 동시에 홀로그램으로 생성한 빛나는 도신이 등을 관통한다.

1100701107.english: - The magical girl's light of justice continued for a while.

1100701109.english: - Magical MoMo pulled the katana that was stuck in Serena.

1100701111.english: - Sarena doesn't fall, but stands and breathes with her shoulders heaving.
1100701111.korean: - 사레나는 쓰러지지 않고 선 채로 어깨를 들썩이며 호흡한다.

1100701112.english: - Even while shaking, it remained still for a while, as if showing the majesty of Goltarion VIII.
1100701112.korean: - 흔들리면서도 골타리온 Ⅷ세의 위엄을 보이듯 한동안 움직이지 않았다.

1100701115.english: - Goltarion VIII knelt and collapsed, falling with a thud.
1100701115.korean: - 골타리온 Ⅷ세는 무릎을 꿇으며 무너졌고, 털썩하는 소리를 내며 쓰러졌다.

1100701116.english: - Magical MoMo took a deep breath and sheathed her katana.
1100701116.korean: - 모모는 숨을 한 번 고르고, 카타나를 칼집에 넣었다.

1100701118.english: If I'm reborn... then let's meet as friends...

1100701119.english: Magical Girl Magical Magical MoMo: The Movie [Goltarion VIII's Counterattack] END.
1100701119.korean: 극장판 마법소녀 매지컬 모모 [골타리온 Ⅷ세의 역습] END.

1100701120.english: - And with that, filming concluded, and after editing and other processes, the movie was completed.
1100701120.korean: - 이렇게 촬영은 종료되었고, 편집 등을 거쳐 영화가 완성되었다.

1100701121.english: - Today, we're at the movie theater that was still intact so we could all watch that movie together. We're going to have a premiere.
1100701121.korean: - 오늘은 그 영화를 다 같이 보기 위해서 온전하게 남아 있던 영화관에 와 있다. 시사회라는 것을 할 예정이다.

1100701122.english: - The audience was packed, with staff who cooperated with the filming and off-duty members invited.
1100701122.korean: - 촬영에 협력해 준 스태프나 비번인 대원들을 초대해서 객석은 만석이었다.

1100701123.english: - This film will also be distributed to infrastructure in various regions. Magical Magical MoMo, being a very popular magical girl series from the start, will surely provide good entertainment for everyone.
1100701123.korean: - 이 영화는 각지의 인프라에도 배급하려고 한다. 애당초 마법소녀 매지컬 모모는 아주 인기 있는 작품이니 모두에게 좋은 오락거리가 되어 주겠지.

1100701124.english: - As the movie started, everyone laughed, gasped, cried... they showed a variety of reactions.
1100701124.korean: - 영화가 시작하자 다들 웃고, 놀라고, 울며… 다양한 반응을 보여주었다.

1100701125.english: - Cardinal Armand and Serena, who were sitting next to me, also looked pleased.
1100701125.korean: - 옆에 앉아 있는 아르망과 사레나도 표정이 좋았다.

1100701127.english: - Considering it was made under circumstances where time and other resources were limited, I thought it was a pretty well-made film.
1100701127.korean: - 시간도 다른 것들도 부족했던 상황에서 만든 것치고는 상당히 잘 만든 영화라고 생각했다.

1100701128.english: - I was so embarrassed by the scenes of me on screen that I got goosebumps, but...
1100701128.korean: - 내가 스크린에 나온 장면은 부끄러워서 소름이 돋았지만….

1100701129.english: The scene where Your Majesty appeared drew an enormous, piercing scream.
1100701129.korean: 폐하가 출연하신 장면은 새된 함성이 엄청났네요.

1100701130.english: That being said, I've heard there used to be cheering screenings where you could shout like that in the past.
1100701130.korean: 그건 그렇지만, 과거에는 그런 식으로 함성을 질러도 되는 응원 상영이라는 게 있었다고 해요.

1100701131.english: Shall we also create a cheering screening for those who want to cheer enthusiastically? I want to cheer too!
1100701131.korean: 열렬히 응원하고 싶어하는 분들을 위해 응원 상영회도 만들까요? 저도 응원하고 싶어요!

1100701132.english: That's right. That would be a good idea. Then, from next time, we'll divide the screening into two parts...
1100701132.korean: 그렇네요. 그렇게 하는 게 좋겠어요. 그럼 다음부터는 상영회를 둘로 나눠서…….

1100701133.english: - It will be shown several more times after this today.
1100701133.korean: - 오늘은 이 뒤에도 몇 번 더 상영될 예정이다.

1100701135.english: ...So many people have watched this... I'm really... really...
1100701135.korean: ……이렇게 많은 분이 봐 주셔서… 정말… 정말로….

1100701137.english: - "Sarena said that, and then she cried."

1100701140.english: Mr. Cardinal Armand, too... really, really... thank you.

1100701141.english: I didn't do anything. It's all because of Your Majesty...
1100701141.korean: 저는 아무것도 안 했는걸요. 모두 폐하께서…….

1100701143.english: - If Cardinal Armand hadn't made that decision then, things wouldn't have turned out this way...
1100701143.korean: - 그때 아르망이 그런 판단을 하지 않았다면, 이렇게 흘러가지 않았을 것이다….

1100701145.english: - Sarena completed the mission and purpose she had intended to fulfill in death, without dying...
1100701145.korean: - 사레나는 죽어서 완수하려 했던 명령과 목적을 죽지 않고 완수했다….

1100701146.english: - What will she aim for in the future...? Of course, I know it's a selfish question.
1100701146.korean: - 앞으로 그녀는 무엇을 목표로 살아가게 될까… 물론 제멋대로인 의문이라는 건 알고 있다.

1100701147.english: - We're the ones who didn't let Serena die. We must take responsibility for Serena's future.
1100701147.korean: - 사레나를 죽게 두지 않은 건 우리다. 사레나의 앞일에 책임을 지지 않으면 안 된다.

1100701149.english: - And, we won't be staying in Fukuoka forever either. I'm leaving here next week. It might seem like I'm rushing you, but you need to decide what you're going to do next.
1100701149.korean: - 그리고, 우리도 계속 후쿠오카에 있는 것은 아니다. 다음 주에는 이곳을 떠난다. 재촉하는 것 같지만, 앞으로 어떻게 할지 정해주어야 한다.

1100701152.english: - As she said that, Sarena stopped, looking at my face.
1100701152.korean: - 그렇게 말하자, 사레나는 내 얼굴을 바라본 채 멈췄다.

1100701154.english: Ahaha... what should I do... I don't know anything... I've lived just to act that scene...
1100701154.korean: 아하하… 어떡하면 좋을까요… 하나도 모르겠어요… 그 장면을 연기하기 위해서 살아왔으니…

1100701155.english: And that Iron Blooded... I even took down the Stalker with my own hands... I did everything I wanted to do...
1100701155.korean: 그리고 그 철충… 스토커도 제 손으로 쓰러뜨렸죠… 하고 싶은 일은 전부 했어요…

1100701156.english: I... Perhaps they're a happy person who has achieved everything they wanted to do.
1100701156.korean: 저는……. 어쩌면, 하고 싶은 일을 전부 이룬 행복한 사람일지도 모르겠네요.

1100701157.english: - Sarena scratched her cheek and laughed.

1100701159.english: - Hearing those words, Cardinal Armand fell silent, as if in pain.
1100701159.korean: - 아르망은 그 말을 듣고 괴로운 듯 침묵했다.

1100701160.english: What are you worried about? It means you can start doing what you love!
1100701160.korean: 뭘 고민하시는 건가요? 좋아하는 일을 시작할 수 있다는 거잖아요!

1100701161.english: - At that moment, Magical MoMo suddenly appeared from behind Serena and laughed.
1100701161.korean: - 그때, 모모가 사레나의 뒤에서 불쑥 나타나며 웃었다.

1100701164.english: Ms. Sarena was born with a predetermined purpose in life.
1100701164.korean: 사레나 씨는 살아갈 목적이 정해진 채 태어났어요.

1100701165.english: They finally achieved their goal and were set free.
1100701165.korean: 겨우 그 목적을 이루고 자유로워진 거예요.

1100701166.english: From now on, I'm going to do a lot of things I love!

1100701167.english: ...Even if it's something I like... I'm not sure... I only thought about acting, so...
1100701167.korean: …좋아하는 것이라고 해도… 잘 모르겠…어요. 연기하는 것밖에 생각하지 않았어서….

1100701168.english: - Sarena touched the wound on her chest.

1100701169.english: If you're not sure, I'll help you find it together.

1100701171.english: Yes! Let's find something we both love... a reason to live! If Magical MoMo, who is dead, were still alive... she would have said the same thing as me.
1100701171.korean: 네! 같이 좋아하는 것을… 살아갈 의미를 찾아봐요! 죽은 모모도 살아있었다면… 저랑 같은 말을 했을 거예요.

1100701172.english: I can tell. Because she's a magical girl...

1100701176.english: I aim to find something I enjoy doing.
1100701176.korean: 좋아하는 일을 찾는 걸 목표로 해요.

1100701178.english: Of course, me too! I'll help!

1100701179.english: It's okay. Because everyone is here! Right?

1100701180.english: ……………I'm not sure if I'll be able to find it right away, but...

1100701182.english: Please take care of me... everyone...

1100701185.english: I found the treasure! I came looking for some decent equipment, but it seems like all the equipment here is usable! You could say this is a treasure trove!
1100701185.korean: 보물을 찾았네요! 쓸만한 기재를 찾으러 왔더니, 쓸 수 있는 기재밖에 없다니! 이거 보물창고라고 해도 과언이 아니겠어요!

1100701186.english: You look like you're having a lot of fun.

1100701187.english: Huh? Aren't you happy, Ms. Leanne?

1100701188.english: No, honestly, I'm having a great time too...

1100701190.english: Thank you for asking me to come with you! I've been wanting to visit the studio!
1100701190.korean: 같이 가자고 해줘서 고마워~ 스튜디오에 오고 싶었어~!

1100701191.english: Oh? Did you? That's good! What are you aiming for? Is that Magical Magical MoMo's outfit?
1100701191.korean: 오? 그랬나요? 그거 다행이에요! 뭘 노리고 계신 건가요? 매지컬 모모의 의상인가요?

1100701195.english: What?! So, is it that sexy outfit of the Faucre the Evil Overlord?!
1100701195.korean: 네?! 그럼 뽀끄루 대마왕의 그 야한 의상인가요?!

1100701196.english: Why are you going on about the costumes?

1100701197.english: Well, Commander, you do seem to like a bit of the unexpected, don't you? So, something like Magical Girl Magical Lianne... I think that would sell pretty well...
1100701197.korean: 그야, 사령관님은 의외성이 있는 것 같은 것도 좋아하시잖아요? 그러니까 마법소녀 매지컬 리앤 같은 것도… 제법 먹힐 것 같거든요….

1100701199.english: You thought it might be okay now, didn't you?

1100701200.english: No, no, no... Even so, it doesn't suit me... that kind of... that kind of thing...
1100701200.korean: 아니아니아니…. 아무리 그래도 나한테는 안 어울리잖아… 그런… 그런 건…….

1100701202.english: I think a benevolent Demon King would be great too...

1100701203.english: It's not the Great Demon King Lee Ann...

1100701204.english: Hehehe... Enough with the jokes, what are you after?
1100701204.korean: 헤헤헤…. 농담은 이 정도로 하고, 뭘 노리고 계신 건가요?

1100701205.english: Oh, that's right. There's something I'm a little concerned about... I wanted to investigate the studio's computer.
1100701205.korean: 아, 그랬지. 조금 신경 쓰이는 게 있어서… 스튜디오의 컴퓨터를 조사하고 싶었어.

1100701207.english: But didn't they say the investigation regarding the data was definitely finished?
1100701207.korean: 그런데 분명 데이터 관련은 전부 조사가 끝났다고 하지 않았나요?

1100701209.english: So, does that mean there are things you can't know unless you see them yourself?
1100701209.korean: 그렇다는 건, 직접 보지 않으면 알 수 없는 게 있다는 건가요?

1100701210.english: That's right. Do you remember? The reason they're re-shooting the entire movie now.
1100701210.korean: 맞아. 기억나? 지금 영화를 전부 다시 찍은 이유.

1100701211.english: That's because... I can't find the shooting data... right?
1100701211.korean: 그게… 촬영 데이터를 찾을 수 없어서… 맞지요?

1100701212.english: Yeah. I wouldn't have thought much of it normally either. Because the inside of buildings can be destroyed by the Iron Worms too.

1100701410.korean: 일단 지금은 철충을 생산하는 공장부터 해결하자.

1100701411.english: Okay. Then, let's reorganize the unit and attack tomorrow.
1100701411.korean: 알겠어. 그럼, 부대를 재편성해서 내일 공격하자.

1100701412.english: Thank you. Please take care of me.

1100701414.english: Joe, good morning... It's been a long time since lunch. Good morning?
1100701414.korean: 조, 좋은 아침…. 점심이 지난 지 한참인데? 좋은 아침?

1100701415.english: No, you don't have to apologize.

1100701416.english: Good morning! Faucre the Evil Overlord!

1100701417.english: You can't start without a director, can you?

1100701419.english: Huh? I thot I asked Magical BaekTo to work on the Orca.
1100701419.korean: 어라? 백토에게는 오르카 호에서 일을 해달라고 부탁해 뒀을 텐데….

1100701420.english: First of all, did Magical BaekTo go to work?

1100701424.english: No, don't worry about it. I was a little surprised, but...
1100701424.korean: 아니, 신경 쓰지 마. 조금 놀라긴 했지만….

1100701425.english: I knew he was acquainted with Faucre the Evil Overlord, but I didn't realize he was also acquainted with Magical MoMo.
1100701425.korean: 뽀끄루와 아는 사이였다는 건 알았지만, 모모와도 그랬구나.

1100701427.english: Were Magical MoMo and her group also ordered to 'protect the studio'?

1100701429.english: Hey, we should be filming right now! Tell me that story sometime if you feel like it.
1100701429.korean: 지, 지금은 촬영을 해야지! 그 이야기는 언젠가 내키면 얘기해 줘.

1100701430.english: Anyway, if we can shoot today, let's work hard.
1100701430.korean: 어쨌든 오늘은 촬영할 수 있을 것 같다면 열심히 하자.

1100701433.english: That's not the Magical BaekTo you know! Run away!
1100701433.korean: 저건 네가 아는 백토가 아니야! 도망쳐!

1100701435.english: Why did it turn out like this...?

1100701438.english: Don't worry, Magical BaekTo is outside with Magical MoMo.
1100701438.korean: 백토는 모모와 함께 밖에 있으니 걱정 마.

1100701439.english: Thank you. What about Faucre the Evil Overlord?

1100701442.english: I think it was a good thing I came here.
1100701442.korean: 여기에 오게 돼서 다행이었던 것 같네.

1100701443.english: Huh...? I see... You don't have to push yourself.

1100701444.english: I'm just grateful that you're responding somehow.

1100701445.english: Okay. Then, let's reorganize the unit and attack tomorrow.
1100701445.korean: 알겠어. 그럼, 부대를 재편성해서 내일 공격하자.

1100701449.english: As expected, EB-48G Hraesvelgr. That's a good idea.

1100701451.english: If you're talking about Azazel, try not to cause too much trouble. Got it?
1100701451.korean: 아자젤을 말하는 거라면, 너무 폐를 끼치지 않도록 해. 알겠지?

1100701452.english: I'm worried it won't go well...

1100701454.english: Then that settles it. Please take care of me starting tomorrow.
1100701454.korean: 그렇다면 이걸로 결정이네. 내일부터 잘 부탁해.

1100701457.english: You're here. Magical BaekTo... Magical MoMo.

1100701459.english: There's a huge structure to the west... Magical Search that place for me.
1100701459.korean: 서쪽에 거대한 구조물이 있다…. 그곳을… 매지컬 서치해 줘.

1100701463.english: Okay. Take her too... She will find traces of the dark energy for you.
1100701463.korean: 그래. 그도 데려가라…. 그가 어둠의 기운의 흔적을 찾아내 줄 테니.

1100701464.english: Please, BaekTo, Magical MoMo! Magical Tiger!

1100701466.english: I don't remember at all how it was... I've forgotten my lines too...
1100701466.korean: 어땠는지 전혀 기억이 안 나…. 대사도 잊어버렸고….

1100701467.english: Yeah... I really owe you my life...

1100701468.english: Really...? Somehow, knowing there's a camera makes me tense up...
1100701468.korean: 그런가…? 왠지 카메라가 있다고 생각하니, 몸에 힘이 들어가서….

1100701469.english: Yeah... If you put it that way... it's no different from usual.
1100701469.korean: 응…. 그렇게 말하자면… 평소랑 다를 게 없네.

1100701471.english: Feather, it would have been great if you could have gone and filmed it too...
1100701471.korean: 페더, 너도 같이 가서 촬영해 오면 좋았을 텐데….

1100701476.english: What do you want me to check?

1100701477.english: Is that movie filming data by any chance?!

1100701478.english: Okay. Since the Sarena party is still filming, let's watch it ourselves first.
1100701478.korean: 알겠어. 사레나 일행은 아직 촬영 중이니까, 우리끼리 먼저 보자.

1100701480.english: Benevolent Leanne, show me that data.

1100701481.english: Rather than there being a reason, I just couldn't decide what the best course of action would be.
1100701481.korean: 이유가 있다기보단, 어떻게 하는 게 좋을지 판단이 서지 않았거든.

1100701482.english: It's true that it's something you don't need to know, and you might be shocked.
1100701482.korean: 몰라도 되는 사실인 것도 맞고, 충격을 받을지도 몰라.

1100701483.english: But within it was the image of a friend who cherishes you.
1100701483.korean: 하지만 그 안에는 너를 소중히 여기는 친구의 모습이 담겨 있었어.

1100701484.english: From his perspective, I'm probably doing something pointless, but...
1100701484.korean: 그 친구 입장에서는 내가 쓸데없는 짓을 하는 거겠지만….

1100701486.english: Thank you. Thanks for telling me.

1100701487.english: I see. It makes us happy to hear you say that too.

1100701488.english: Yeah. Let's work hard for the remaining shoots.

1100701491.english: But isn't it quite a distance away?
1100701491.korean: 하지만 꽤 거리가 떨어져 있지 않나?

1100701493.english: Yeah. I think this is the guy I was looking for. Thank you.
1100701493.korean: 응. 찾고 있던 녀석인 것 같아. 고마워.

1100701495.english: That's true... We need to prepare both the combat units and the stalker suppression units.
1100701495.korean: 그렇네…. 전투부대도 그렇고, 스토커 토벌부대도 준비해야겠어.

1100701497.english: Oh, yeah. I'm filming a movie. I'm also getting help from the line writers.
1100701497.korean: 아, 응. 영화를 찍고 있거든. 라인리터에게도 도움을 받고 있어.

1100701498.english: No... has it been about a week?

1100701499.english: Sorry. I just didn't mention it because I felt bad contacting you about something like this...
1100701499.korean: 미안. 이런걸로 굳이 연락하기 미안해서 얘기하지 않은 것뿐이야….

1100701500.english: It didn't quite reach unification, but...

1100701503.english: Doesn't it seem like they're angry...?

1100701504.english: I knew it... But why did they show up at this timing?
1100701504.korean: 역시 그렇군…. 하지만, 왜 이 타이밍에 나타난 거지?

1100701505.english: So you're saying you came for revenge because I broke that?

1100701506.english: I understand why it appeared. Next is the combat unit.

1100701510.english: Yeah. We're currently planning a strategy to take that guy down.
1100701510.korean: 응. 지금 그 녀석을 쓰러뜨리기 위해 작전을 짜고 있어.

1100701511.english: Hmm... I'm not considering that right now.
1100701511.korean: 음…. 지금은 그건 고려하고 있지 않아.

1100701512.english: That's how it happened. So, Sarena can't participate in the operation.
1100701512.korean: 그렇게 된 거야. 그러니까 사레나는 작전에 참여할 수 없어.

1100701513.english: I will definitely defeat that Metal Parasite. Promise me that.
1100701513.korean: 반드시 그 철충을 쓰러뜨릴게. 그것만큼은 약속해.

1100701518.english: Oh dear, I ended up making them the hated character...

1100701519.english: Thank you. Then let's start the strategy meeting.

1100701520.english: Okay. Just in case, I'm asking, it's not two, is it?
1100701520.korean: 알겠어. 혹시나 해서 묻는데, 두 마리라거나 하진 않지?

1100701521.english: That's a relief. Keep giving warnings.

1100701525.english: No, I'll just be out for a moment.

1100701526.english: That's true, but just a moment.

1100701527.english: I just stepped out for a moment.

1100701529.english: It'll be okay if the line leader is with us.

1100701533.english: I want Magical MoMo to tell that story.
1100701533.korean: 그 이야기를 모모가 해 줬으면 해.

1100701534.english: I don't want to be the only one getting points after making Indomitable Marie play the role of the hated one...
1100701534.korean: 마리에게 미움받는 역할을 시켜놓고 나만 점수를 따고 싶진 않거든….

1100701535.english: It's okay, let's just say Magical MoMo took care of it.
1100701535.korean: 괜찮으니까, 모모가 손을 써 준 걸로 하자.

1100701541.english: Okay. Let's do that. Let's say Magical MoMo secretly took it.
1100701541.korean: 알겠어. 그렇게 하자. 모모가 몰래 데리고 간 걸로 해줘.

1100701542.english: Just so you know, you're going to be participating in the operation, right?
1100701542.korean: 일단 말해두겠는데, 작전에 참여하게 되는 거다?

1100701543.english: ...If you know, that's enough. Let me know if you go to Faucre the Evil Overlord too.
1100701543.korean: ……알고 있다면 됐어. 뽀끄루도 가게 되면 알려줘.

1100701544.english: I knew it would come to that.

1100701545.english: Nothing much will happen, but we'll send support to the Horde. Indomitable Marie, have the Second Extermination Unit go.
1100701545.korean: 별일 없겠지만, 호드에게 지원을 투입. 마리, 제2토벌부대가 가도록 해.

1100701547.english: AL Phantom, Shade, retreat for now!

1100701549.english: No, it's not your fault. I definitely didn't think this far ahead.
1100701549.korean: 아니, 너희 잘못이 아니야. 아무래도 여기까진 생각 못 했어.

1100701551.english: That's enough. Snipe as many as possible to reduce the number of Iron Blooded that are shielding the stalker!
1100701551.korean: 그거면 돼. 가능한 한 저격해서 스토커를 감싼 철충의 수를 줄여!

1100701553.english: Yeah. I'm so excited, my heart is pounding.

1100701556.english: Okay... You probably want to see the final scene after it's finished.
1100701556.korean: 그래…. 마지막 장면은 완성된 걸 보고 싶은 거겠지.

1100701557.english: Yeah. I should give something in return to EB-48G Hraesvelgr when this is over.
1100701557.korean: 응. 흐레스벨그에게는 끝나면 뭔가 답례를 해야겠어.

1100701560.english: Oh... Come to think of it, where's Azaz?
1100701560.korean: 아……. 그러고 보니, 아자즈는 어디 있지?

1100701562.english: Oh my goodness... Azaz, you worked hard this time too.

1100701564.english: Oh, well, anyway, I can tell you had fun.

1100701565.english: Good morning, Serena. Finally, today's the day.

1100701566.english: Ahaha. It's too early to cry.

1100701567.english: Yeah. Please take care of me.

1100701568.english: Yeah. Let's watch it together when it's finished.

1100701572.english: You're supposed to watch movies quietly, aren't you...?

1100701576.english: No, this whole thing wouldn't have been able to start if it weren't for Cardinal Armand.
1100701576.korean: 아니, 이번 일은 아르망이 없었다면 시작할 수 없었어.

1100701577.english: Sarena. What do you want to do from now on?

1100701578.english: I'd like to give you time to think, but we can't stay here forever either.
1100701578.korean: 생각할 시간을 주고 싶지만, 우리도 계속 여기 있을 건 아니라서.

1100701579.english: Okay. I'll look for it with you.

1100701581.english: It's okay. Let me know if anything else happens.
1100701581.korean: 괜찮아. 또 무슨 일이 생기면 말해줘.

1100701582.english: Nice to meet you! Okay, that's all for now.

1100701583.english: If EB-48G Hraesvelgr is okay with it, then I'm fine too.

1100701584.english: That's what they say, Cardinal Armand. Will it be okay?

1100701586.english: That took longer than I expected, didn't it?

1100701589.english: You're back after the Magical Search is over...

1100701594.english: I'll check. Do you really want to become a magical girl?
1100701594.korean: 확인하겠다. 정말로 마법소녀가 되고 싶은 건가?

1100701595.english: The path of a magical girl must be difficult, though...?

1100701596.english: If you're going to quit, now's the time...

1100701597.english: Okay... Then, work hard. AL Phantom Black!
1100701597.korean: 알겠다…. 그럼, 열심히 하도록. 팬텀 블랙!

1100701599.english: Could I ask you a favor?

1100701603.english: It's a strange time to say good morning.
1100701603.korean: 좋은 아침이라고 하기에는 시국이 하 수상하군요.

1100701604.english: Talking about the weather, it's been bad lately, and talking about sports, there aren't any proper sports broadcasts because of the war with PECS and Black River.
1100701604.korean: 날씨 이야기를 하자니 최근 날씨가 좋지 못하고, 스포츠 이야기를 하자니 PECS, 블랙리버와의 전쟁 때문에 제대로 된 스포츠 중계도 안 하는군요.

1100701605.english: Talking about movies or dramas is no fun because most of them are propaganda pieces.
1100701605.korean: 영화나 드라마 이야기를 하자니 프로파간다 작품이 대부분이니 영 재미가 없군요.

1100701606.english: Of course, our Densetsu also produces propaganda works of excellent quality.
1100701606.korean: 물론 우리 덴세츠는 프로파간다 작품도 훌륭한 퀄리티로 뽑아내긴 하지만요.

1100701607.english: This should be enough to get things moving along at a decent pace.
1100701607.korean: 이 정도면 적당히 서두는 채운 거 같군요.

1100701608.english: Getting straight to the point, you're all probably aware of the mysterious monster that suddenly appeared recently.
1100701608.korean: 본론으로 들어가자면 최근에 갑자기 나타난 미지의 괴물에 대해서는 전부 아실 겁니다.

1100701609.english: These monsters are indiscriminately destroying the city and slaughtering people.
1100701609.korean: 이 괴물들은 무차별적으로 도시를 파괴하고 사람들을 살육하고 있습니다.

1100701610.english: Unfortunately, some employes who commute downtown have become victims of these monsters.
1100701610.korean: 안타깝게도 시내에서 출퇴근 하는 몇몇 직원이 이 괴물들에게 희생되는 일이 발생했습니다.

1100701611.english: Fortunately, because it was during the peak of production and they were staying and eating at the branch office, most of the staff were safe, as the saying goes, "misfortune may be a blessing in disguise."
1100701611.korean: 그나마 다행인건 한창 작품을 만드는 시기라 지국에서 숙식을 해결한 덕분에 새옹지마로 대부분의 직원이 무사할 수는 있었습니다.

1100701612.english: Leaving that aside. Our chairman, Chairman Yoshimitsu, has issued a notice to the entire Dentsu group regarding our response to a new enemy.
1100701612.korean: 차치하고. 우리 덴세츠의 회장이신 요시미츠 회장님께서 새로운 적에 대한 대응을 덴세츠 전체에 공문으로 내리셨습니다.

1100701613.english: Heroes appear in times of chaos. Let's create a real hero's tale for the legend.
1100701613.korean: 영웅은 난세에 나타난다. 덴세츠의 진짜 영웅담을 만들어보자.

1100701614.english: I don't think it means you should create a new work only after going through the process of creating new characters, writing a scenario, and recruiting staff from now on.
1100701614.korean: 지금부터 새로운 인물을 만들고, 시나리오를 짜고, 스태프를 모집하는 과정을 거친 후에 새로운 작품을 만들라는 의미는 아닐 겁니다.

1100701615.english: It means you're being asked to create a record that will be praised as heroic by fighting against an unknown enemy, one that might be larger and more powerful than the existing enemies currently hostile to humanity.
1100701615.korean: 지금 인류와 적대하고 있는, 기존의 적들보다 더 크고 강대할지도 모르는 미지의 적과 싸워서 영웅이라고 찬양을 받을 전적을 만들어내라는 의미겠죠.

1100701616.english: Our Densetsu pursued extreme realism under the motto "more real than real."
1100701616.korean: 우리 덴세츠는 ‘실제보다 더 실제같이’라는 모토하에 극한의 리얼리즘을 추구했습니다.

1100701617.english: Thanks to this, we've created a production that feels natural and actors who are more professional than even specialized androids.
1100701617.korean: 덕분에 위화감 없는 연출과 전문 바이오로이드보다 더 전문적인 바이오로이드 배우들을 만들어냈습니다.

1100701618.english: And this was no exception for battles or wars.
1100701618.korean: 그리고 이건 전투도, 전쟁도 예외가 아니었습니다.

1100701619.english: In the movies, in the red arena, and in the ongoing corporate war, Densetsu's Bioroids are more real than real. They showed even more force than that.
1100701619.korean: 영화에서도, 붉은 아레나에서도 그리고 지금 현재 진행중인 기업 간의 전쟁에서도 덴세츠의 바이오로이드는 실제보다 더 실제같이. 실제 그 이상의 무력을 보여주었습니다.

1100701620.english: And now. Amidst the current crisis, I am confident that Densetsu can perform even more brilliantly than they have in the past, exceeding expectations.
1100701620.korean: 그리고 지금. 당면한 위기 속에서 덴세츠는 실제보다 더 실제같이 그 이상의 활약상을 보여줄 수 있을 거라 확신합니다.

1100701621.english: Let's show the monsters outside right now, and all of humanity, the reality of Densetsu.
1100701621.korean: 지금 밖에 있는 저 괴물들에게 그리고 모든 인류에게 덴세츠의 실제를 보여줍시다.

1100701622.english: Alright, let's gather all the combat actors and fight those monsters.
1100701622.korean: 자, 모든 전투용 배우들을 중심으로 저 괴물들과 맞서 싸웁시다.

1100701623.english: So, in the end, it's just us who have to work our butts off, huh?

1100701625.english: Because of the war between companies, our next series was scrapped during pre-production, and I've just been eating scraps ever since.
1100701625.korean: 기업간의 전쟁으로 우리 다음 시리즈도 프리 프로덕션 단계에서 엎어져서 그 동안 눈칫밥만 먹었으니.

1100701626.english: What kind of hint are you eating? You're in charge of guarding the branch office, aren't you?
1100701626.korean: 뭔 눈칫밥을 먹어. 지국 경비하는 일 맡았잖아.

1100701627.english: I don't see how that's any different from a jobless person calling themselves a "home security guard."
1100701627.korean: 백수가 자칭 자택경비원이라고 말하는 거랑 뭐가 다른 지 모르겠군.

1100701628.english: No matter what, we were born to be actors, weren't we?

1100701629.english: An actor who is forgotten if they don't work, and whose existence loses value if they are forgotten.
1100701629.korean: 작품 활동 안 하면 잊혀지고, 잊혀지면 존재가치가 사라지는 배우.

1100701630.english: Thanks to this war, it's been a while since I've been active, even tho it's different from the previous series.
1100701630.korean: 이번 전쟁 덕분에 기존 시리즈와는 다르지만 오랜만에 작품 활동하는 거고.

1100701631.english: It's so convenient that it's neither human nor a Bioroid, so you can just relax and fight it with all your might.
1100701631.korean: 인간도, 바이오로이드도 아니니 마음 놓고 힘껏 상대하면 되니 얼마나 편한가.

1100701632.english: Oh, are you feeling motivated because you're going to be filming a heroic tale?
1100701632.korean: 오, 영웅담을 찍게 되니 의욕이 솟구치나 봐?

1100701634.english: Since life and death won't depend on the script, it's a relief.
1100701634.korean: 대본에 따라 생사가 갈리는 일은 없을 테니 마음이 편하지.

1100701635.english: Knowing in advance the death that is determined by the will of another, and walking while facing that predetermined death...
1100701635.korean: 타자의 의지에 따라 정해진 자신의 죽음을 미리 알고, 정해진 죽음을 마주하면서 걸어가는 게…

1100701638.english: You're one of the main characters, so it's less likely to happen to you.
1100701638.korean: 너는 주연 중 하나이니 그럴 일은 적겠지만.

1100701639.english: In many works, even the main character dies, you know?
1100701639.korean: 작품 중에는 주연도 죽는 작품도 많거든?

1100701640.english: Of course, the chances are lower compared to other actors, but...
1100701640.korean: 물론 다른 배우들에 비해서 가능성은 적지만…

1100701642.english: From now on, we'll be holding the operations meeting and the production meeting simultaneously, so everyone please head to the meeting room without fail!
1100701642.korean: 지금부터 작전 회의랑 연출 회의 동시에 진행할 거니까 빠짐 없이 회의실로!

1100701644.english: Let's go create our new work!

1100701645.english: Everyone, thank you for your hard work.

1100701646.english: Amidst the despair and confusion caused by the sudden appearance of the monster, our Densetsu successfully achieved significant results.
1100701646.korean: 갑작스러운 괴물의 등장으로 절망적이고 혼란스러운 와중에 우리 덴세츠는 유의미한 성과를 내는데 성공했습니다.

1100701647.english: After repelling the unknown monster, reclaiming part of the city, and rescuing the survivors, they rallied the ownerless androids to form a front that would serve as a foothold for the counterattack.
1100701647.korean: 미지의 괴물을 격퇴하고 도시의 일부를 탈환, 생존자들을 구출한 후, 주인 잃은 바이오로이드들을 규합하여 반격의 교두보가 될 전선을 형성했습니다.

1100701648.english: We have successfully communicated with a nearby military unit and plan to begin a full-scale sweep in the near future.
1100701648.korean: 가까운 군부대와의 교신도 성공하여 근시일내로 본격적인 소탕에 들어갈 예정입니다.

1100701649.english: However, with monster attacks happening worldwide, there are predictions that this situation won't end quickly.
1100701649.korean: 그러나 괴물들의 습격이 전 세계적으로 벌어지고 있는 실정이니 이번 사태가 단기적으로 끝나지는 않을 거라는 예측이 나오고 있습니다.

1100701650.english: Just as running a marathon like a sprint won't last long, it would be wise to approach the situation with a long-term perspective and some leeway.
1100701650.korean: 마라톤을 단거리 달리기로 달렸다가는 오래가지 못하는 것처럼 장기적인 안목으로 어느 정도 여유를 가지고 사태에 임하는 것이 옳을 것입니다.

1100701651.english: However, since our victory is certain today, I hope you will celebrate and get plenty of rest.
1100701651.korean: 하지만 오늘 만큼은 우리들의 승리가 확실하니 이를 축하하며 충분한 휴식을 가지길 바랍니다.

1100701652.english: Hahaha! Easy win! Easy win! They weren't anything special.
1100701652.korean: 하하하하! 낙승! 낙승! 별 거 아닌 녀석들이었지.

1100701654.english: It's a mystery how they suddenly appeared from the sky, and what could be the reason for their indiscriminate killing of humans and their destructive behavior?
1100701654.korean: 갑자기 하늘에서 나타난 것도 의문이고, 무차별적으로 인간을 살해하고, 파괴를 일삼는 이유가 뭘까?

1100701655.english: Why are you making it so difficult?

1100701656.english: In a world where there are so many guys frantically trying to summon evil gods to destroy the world.
1100701656.korean: 세계를 멸망시키려려고 악신을 소환하려고 분주하게 애쓰는 녀석들도 넘쳐나는 판에.

1100701657.english: Isn't that just a story within the work?
1100701657.korean: 그건 어디까지나 작품 속의 이야기지 않나.

1100701658.english: The monsters roaming outside appeared suddenly for no apparent reason, and they don't seem like they're going to engage in slaughter and destruction.
1100701658.korean: 밖에 돌아다니는 괴물들이 아무런 이유 없이 갑자기 나타났고, 살육과 파괴를 일삼을 것 같지는 않아.

1100701659.english: Who knows, maybe they appeared here without even realizing it themselves, and they're confused and just killing everything.
1100701659.korean: 모르지 그쪽도 자신들도 모르는 새에 이쪽에 나타나서 혼란스러워서 다 죽이고 다니는 걸 수도 있지.

1100701660.english: To survive on this hellish planet.
1100701660.korean: 이 지옥 같은 행성에서 살아남기 위해서.

1100701661.english: Well, that doesn't really sound like something the protagonist of a work with the theme of good triumphing over evil should be saying...
1100701661.korean: 일단은 권선징악이 주제인 작품의 주인공이 할 말은 아닌 거 같은데…

1100701662.english: But in my work, I wasn't exactly the completely good type, was I?
1100701662.korean: 나 작품에서도 철저하게 착한 편은 아니었는데?

1100701663.english: ...Come to think of it, that's true.

1100701664.english: Because if things didn't go his way, he'd deceive others and prioritize the prize money over doing good deeds.
1100701664.korean: 수틀리면 다른 사람들을 속여먹고 선행보다는 상금을 우선시 했으니.

1100701665.english: Their personality was also designed to fit the Setting.

1100701666.english: It's true, but coming from you, of all people, it's a bit... awkward?
1100701666.korean: 사실이기는 한데… 다른 애도 아니고 너한테 그런 소리를 들으니 조금 그렇다?

1100701667.english: Well, in the Setting, I'm supposed to be a calm and friendly next-door neighbor type in my usual state.
1100701667.korean: 일단 나도 설정상으로는 평상시에는 차분하고 친절한 옆집 누나 같은 성격이니까.

1100701668.english: Aren't you embarrassed to say that yourself?

1100701669.english: By Setting. According to the Setting.

1100701670.english: Look at your face turning red. You felt embarrassed even after saying it yourself, didn't you?
1100701670.korean: 얼굴 붉어지는 거 봐. 스스로 말하고도 민망했지?

1100701671.english: You really have a great personality.

1100701672.english: Because she's a shrine maiden of justice and beauty.

1100701678.english: The important thing is that we performed today, defeated the monster, and saved people, right?
1100701678.korean: 중요한 건 오늘 우리가 활약해서 괴물을 무찌르고 사람을 구했다는 거잖아.

1100701679.english: And our performance was probably captured well too.
1100701679.korean: 그리고 우리들의 활약상도 잘 찍혔을 거고.

1100701680.english: If we can just handle this situation well, it will be good for our Daewoo, and we'll also benefit when we film our next project, right?
1100701680.korean: 이번 사태만 잘 수습되면 우리 대우도 좋아지고, 다음 작품 찍을 때에도 이득이 있겠지?

1100701681.english: So, let's wash up, eat well, get plenty of rest, and prepare for the next battle.
1100701681.korean: 그러니 씻고, 잘 먹고, 푹 쉰 후에 다음 전투를 준비하자고.

1100701682.english: Then you'll be able to reach a good ending before long!
1100701682.korean: 그러면 오래지 않아 굿 엔딩을 맞이할 수 있을거야!

1100701683.english: The priestess of justice and beauty! Koyori appears!

1100701684.english: Do I really have to do that?

1100701686.english: We don't want people who see our records later to not know who we are, do we?
1100701686.korean: 나중에 우리 기록물을 본 사람들이 우리가 누군지 모르면 안 되잖아.

1100701687.english: Anyway, our other works will remain, right?

1100701688.english: And Dentsu will be heavily promoting this here.
1100701688.korean: 그리고 덴세츠에서 여기에 대해서 대대적으로 홍보를 할 거고.

1100701689.english: It's a long shot. Just in case.

1100701691.english: You were so confident when we were filming our work.
1100701691.korean: 우리 작품 찍을 때는 너도 당당하게 말해놓고선.

1100701692.english: That was when we were filming the work...

1100701693.english: This is also a work of art, you know?

1100701694.english: Strictly speaking, our previous works were entertainment, while what we're filming now is closer to a documentary.
1100701694.korean: 엄밀하게 구분하자면 우리 기존 작품은 오락이고 지금 찍는 건 다큐에 가깝지.

1100701695.english: Being too assertive isn't very good.

1100701696.english: You're saying that, but you're also wearing an outfit that strongly emphasizes certain areas.
1100701696.korean: 그렇게 말하는 너도 특정 부위의 자기주장이 강한 복장을 입고 있잖아.

1100701698.english: Do you know that sexual harassment can occur even between women... or even between androids?
1100701698.korean: 여자끼리도… 바이오로이드끼리도 성희롱이 성립되는 것은 아나?
